title: Inception
description: A skilled thief enters people's dreams to steal secrets from their subconscious.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of astronauts travels through a wormhole near Saturn in search of a new home for humanity.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: A banker is wrongly convicted of murder and forms an unlikely friendship while enduring life in prison.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham City into chaos.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: The lives of two hitmen, a boxer, and a gangster's wife intertwine in a series of darkly comic tales.

title: The Matrix
description: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines controlling humanity.

title: Forrest Gump
description: A slow-witted but kind-hearted man from Alabama witnesses and unwittingly influences major historical events.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family schemes their way into the employment of a wealthy household with unexpected consequences.

title: Spirited Away
description: A young girl wanders into a spirit world and must find a way to free herself and her transformed parents.

title: The Godfather
description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: Goodfellas
description: The story of Henry Hill's rise and fall within the New York mob over several decades.

title: Schindler's List
description: A German businessman saves over a thousand Jewish refugees during the Holocaust by employing them in his factories.

title: Fight Club
description: An insomniac office worker and a soap salesman form an underground fight club that evolves into something far more dangerous.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
description: An FBI trainee seeks the help of an imprisoned cannibal to catch a serial killer on the loose.

title: Whiplash
description: A young drummer at a prestigious music conservatory is pushed to his limits by a ruthless instructor.

title: Oppenheimer
description: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer and the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
description: A Chinese-American laundromat owner is swept into an adventure spanning multiple universes to save existence itself.

title: No Country for Old Men
description: A hunter stumbles upon drug money in the Texas desert and is pursued by a relentless and merciless killer.

title: Get Out
description: A young Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and discovers a terrifying secret.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in a high-octane chase across the desert.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
description: A legendary concierge and his young protégé become embroiled in the theft of a priceless painting and a murder mystery.

title: Arrival
description: A linguist is recruited by the military to communicate with alien lifeforms who have landed on Earth.
